utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: So how are things going with Paul ?

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Although you know , he ... he is a private guy .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: You know , I wish I could get him to open up a little bit , share some feelings .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: That is easy ! You just have to think of him as a ... as a jar of pickles that will not open .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: So what are you saying . I should run him under hot water and bang his head against a table ?

emotion_cause.span: 6_So what are you saying . I should run him under hot water and bang his head against a table ?

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: No that is what you do when you want to get the truth out of someone .
